title: How Anthropic Engineers ACTUALLY Prompt Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese presents four rules for effectively prompting Claude Code based on studying Anthropic engineers' practices: prompt skills not models, build composable reusable skills, embed scripts within skills, and iterate skills across sessions. The framing emphasizes that most users approach this incorrectly.
